state_contract.idle: process stopped; no false motion, heat, flow, or production sound
state_contract.running: only physically relevant moving, hot, flowing, electrical, or pressure elements activate
state_contract.fault: process stops; a restrained alarm cue and actionable diagnostic identify the blocking condition

machines.prototype_zh: 单肘板布莱克式颚式破碎机
machines.silhouette: deep feed mouth over a tapered jaw chamber with two heavy cheek plates
machines.idle_cue: closed dark chamber and unlit load lamp
machines.running_cue: alternating jaw motion, short ore-dust bursts, load lamp
machines.fault_cue: jaw stopped with amber overload lamp

machines.silhouette: large horizontal drum on two bearing pedestals
machines.idle_cue: stationary drum and dark bearing indicators
machines.running_cue: slow drum rotation, fine dust at discharge, bearing lamp
machines.fault_cue: stationary drum with red bearing-temperature lamp

machines.silhouette: sloped screen deck suspended on visible isolation springs
machines.idle_cue: level screen and relaxed springs
machines.running_cue: small deck vibration and sorted-grain flicker

machines.silhouette: partly exposed horizontal drum between feed box and split discharge
machines.idle_cue: dark field coils and still drum
machines.running_cue: rotating drum, restrained blue field motes, split stream
machines.fault_cue: field loss lamp and stopped feed

machines.silhouette: open process tank with central impeller shaft and froth launder
machines.idle_cue: flat dark liquid and stopped impeller
machines.running_cue: localized froth, circulation, and concentrate overflow
machines.fault_cue: low-level or no-air alarm without bubbles

machines.silhouette: refractory vertical vessel with windbox and hot off-gas neck
machines.idle_cue: cold dark refractory window
machines.running_cue: controlled orange bed glow and sparse hot-gas shimmer
machines.fault_cue: temperature excursion lamp and closed feed

machines.prototype_zh: 紧凑型竖炉直接还原炉
machines.silhouette: tall refractory shaft over a sealed hot discharge hearth
machines.idle_cue: cold sight glass and closed tap
machines.running_cue: deep furnace glow, gas pulse, occasional hot scale

machines.prototype_zh: 搅拌式湿法冶金浸出槽
machines.silhouette: cylindrical lined tank with top agitator and side sampling ports
machines.idle_cue: still opaque slurry and neutral indicators
machines.running_cue: slow vortex, reagent pulse, wet mist
machines.fault_cue: pH or low-level warning with stopped dosing

machines.silhouette: rectangular electrolyte tank with parallel electrode busbars
machines.idle_cue: dark busbars and still electrolyte
machines.running_cue: small electrode bubbles and blue-white current motes

machines.silhouette: vertical ram above a compact die table inside four columns
machines.idle_cue: ram raised and pressure lamp dark
machines.running_cue: single controlled press stroke and short dust ring
machines.fault_cue: guard or pressure trip with ram stopped

machines.silhouette: sealed pressure vessel with top agitator and jacket connections
machines.idle_cue: still sight glass and neutral pressure
machines.running_cue: measured agitation, jacket flow, occasional vapor wisp
machines.fault_cue: pressure or temperature alarm and isolated feeds

machines.prototype: trayed fractionation column with reboiler and condenser
machines.prototype_zh: 带再沸器和冷凝器的板式精馏塔
machines.silhouette: tall narrow column with repeated tray bands and two product elevations

faces.front: tray sight glasses and reflux indicator

machines.idle_cue: dark tray windows and no reflux
machines.running_cue: ascending vapor glints and descending reflux drops

machines.silhouette: horizontal U-trough with central shaft and top loading lids
machines.idle_cue: stationary shaft and closed discharge
machines.running_cue: slow shaft rhythm and restrained powder circulation

machines.silhouette: vapor body above a recirculation loop and crystal slurry outlet

faces.front: crystal sight glass and supersaturation indicator

machines.idle_cue: clear still solution
machines.running_cue: slow crystal glints and vapor wisps

machines.silhouette: long rotating refractory cylinder on support rollers
machines.idle_cue: cold shell and stationary tyre
machines.running_cue: slow shell rotation and hot discharge shimmer

machines.silhouette: paired vertical adsorption vessels joined by a valve manifold
machines.idle_cue: equal pressures and closed sequence lamps
machines.running_cue: alternating valve pulses and faint clean-gas wisps

machines.silhouette: short inclined drum with spray header and product hood
machines.idle_cue: stationary drum and dry window
machines.running_cue: rolling granule motion and brief pellet spray

machines.silhouette: thick-walled reactor with intensive cooling jacket and sealed agitator
machines.idle_cue: dark resin window and neutral jacket
machines.running_cue: slow viscous motion and cooling pulses

machines.prototype: radiant-coil steam cracking furnace with quench
machines.prototype_zh: 带急冷系统的辐射炉管蒸汽裂解炉
machines.silhouette: rectangular radiant furnace linked to a tall quench section
machines.idle_cue: cold coils and dark burner ports
machines.running_cue: bright coil bands, controlled burner shimmer, quench mist

machines.silhouette: thick reactor vessel surrounded by compressor and recycle pipe loop
machines.idle_cue: depressurized loop and dark recycle indicator
machines.running_cue: steady compressor pulse and moving recycle tracer

machines.silhouette: tall packed column with top spray header and bottom recirculation sump
machines.idle_cue: dry packing and no recirculation
machines.running_cue: descending droplets and sparse clean-gas wisps

devices.prototype_zh: 封闭式紧凑燃烧发电机组
devices.silhouette: low enclosed prime mover coupled to a guarded alternator and exhaust stack
devices.idle_cue: dark control panel, stopped alternator, and no exhaust
devices.running_cue: steady alternator lamp, restrained exhaust pulse, and low vibration
devices.fault_cue: overtemperature or no-fuel lamp with stopped shaft

devices.silhouette: long turbine casing aligned with a cylindrical generator and guarded coupling
devices.idle_cue: stopped shaft, neutral load meter, and no condensate plume
devices.running_cue: stable shaft hum, blue load lamp, and sparse warm condensate mist
devices.fault_cue: overspeed, bearing, or steam-loss trip with closed inlet
